_comment: NPC: Dao Master Blue Dream (蓝梦道主). Canon ID: N16. Li Qianmei's father; Blue Silk Clan patriarch; taught Wang Lin Light Shadow Shield (Ch.1321), Dao Art Fusion, and Overturn Heaven Seal. Healed Li Qianmei at the cost of her memories. Wang Lin injured his palm at one point (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md N16/N29; CANON_RI_CHARACTER_DECISIONS.md CD-mentor-set; provenance/light_and_shadow_shield.json). Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Dao Master Blue Dream
personality: powerful patriarch; protective father; dao-master gravitas
relationship_to_wanglin: father-in-law; mentor (taught Wang Lin 3 signature techniques)

perception_tiers.core_formation: Dao Master Blue Dream; Void Tribulant+
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Li Qianmei's father; Blue Silk Clan patriarch
perception_tiers.spirit_severing: Void Tribulant+; taught Wang Lin Light Shadow Shield, Dao Art Fusion, Overturn Heaven Seal

note: Li Qianmei's father; Blue Silk Clan patriarch. Taught Wang Lin Light Shadow Shield (Ch.1321), Dao Art Fusion, Overturn Heaven Seal. Healed Li Qianmei at the cost of her memories. Status at edge of canon: unknown per CANON_RI_EDGE_OF_CANON_STATE.md §4.5 ('Dao Master Blue Dream's status unknown'). Source: CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md N16, CANON_RI_EDGE_OF_CANON_STATE.md, provenance/light_and_shadow_shield.json, ri_canon_database.json N16.

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.
